articles.title: Analysts’ Top Consumer Cyclical Picks: Starbucks (SBUX), Packaging (PKG)
articles.summary: Analysts are showing bullish sentiment towards Starbucks (SBUX) and Packaging (PKG) within the Consumer Cyclical sector. Tigress Financial reiterated a Buy rating on Starbucks with a $122.00 price target, while Bank of America Securities maintained a Buy rating on Packaging. Both companies hold a "Moderate Buy" consensus among analysts, predicting an upside from their current stock levels.
